section_analysis.description: Daily routine narrative. Clean guitar strumming. Focus on 'Morning preparation'.
Bouncy emotional release. 'Ohayou' (Good Morning) motif. High syncopation with cute melodic delivery.

lyrics.original: おはようのオーディションして 髪型もバッチリOK
lyrics.romaji: Ohayou no oodishon shite Kamigata mo bacchiri OK
lyrics.meta: Signature rehearsal motif. Youthful daily life focus.

lyrics.original: 金曜日は頑張らなくちゃ だって二日会えないからね
lyrics.romaji: Kin'youbi wa ganbara nakucha Datte futsuka aenai kara ne

stylistic_dna.main_instrument: Clean Electric Guitar, Grand Piano, Steady Pop Drums
